themes.label: Holiness
themes.summary: This chapter focuses on holiness, righteousness, purity, consecration, or being set apart. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "And when he that hath an issue is cleansed of his issue; then he shall number to himself seve...". Word-study detail reinforces "וְטָהֵֽר׃: and shall be clean - to be pure (physical sound, clear, unadulterated; levitically...".
